nudges.text: Try the 3/4 angle — it adds depth
The relaxed lean feels more approachable

pairings.text: That angle + a warm backdrop? Let me show you.
Good angle. Now let's dress the part.

nudges.text: Try the garden — it softens everything
Outdoor light changes the whole mood

pairings.text: That backdrop + a blazer would be sharp.
This setting wants warmer light. Let me refine it.

nudges.text: Try something casual — it might surprise you

pairings.text: Good outfit. The background should match this energy.

nudges.text: Warmer lighting would tie this together
Try lifting the shadows a bit

pairings.text: Refinement done. Want to try a different background?
Looking good. Try a different outfit to compare.

looks.text: Want a shortcut? Try 'Corporate' — I'll handle everything.
The 'Creative Director' look might suit you.

variations.text: Not sure? Let me show you 3 options.
Want to see what else works? I'll pick a few.

pin.text: This is good. Pin it and let's try something different.
Worth keeping. Pin this and explore more.
